post.description:
Generate RFQ message text without persisting anything.

Useful for the trader to review the LME-formatted message before
actually creating / sending the RFQ.
Award a specific quote — creates a contract from this counterparty's quote.
Cancel an RFQ in CREATED or SENT state.
Re-send invitation to a specific counterparty.
Reject a specific counterparty quote without closing the RFQ.

get.description: List all quotes for a specific RFQ.

schema.title: Response List Rfq Quotes Rfqs  Rfq Id  Quotes Get

get.description: List all state-transition events for an RFQ (timeline).

schema.title: Response List Rfq State Events Rfqs  Rfq Id  State Events Get

get.description:
Webhook verification.

- **Meta**: echoes ``hub.challenge`` if verify token matches.
- **Twilio**: no verification needed — returns 200.

schema.title: Response Verify Webhook Webhooks Whatsapp Get

post.description:
Receive inbound WhatsApp messages.

Provider-aware:

- **Meta** (JSON body + HMAC-SHA256 via ``X-Hub-Signature-256``)
- **Twilio** (form-encoded body + ``X-Twilio-Signature``)

In both cases, messages are enqueued and a background task drains
the queue via ``RFQOrchestrator``.  Returns 200 immediately to
meet provider timeout requirements.

schema.title: Response Receive Webhook Webhooks Whatsapp Post
